rationale: The citing paper’s core design is dynamic VAR-based modeling with impulse responses and persistence over time, while the cited paper introduces a dynamic asymmetric SVAR framework for short- vs. long-run effects and lasting impact (“loom longer”). This methodological and temporal-over-time overlap makes a substantive method/foundational link plausible, and with only a DOI match (no in-text context), it is not safe to treat as an obvious mention-only citation.
